evidence_spans.span: The score function is the derivative of the log-likelihood with respect to the parameter, s(θ) = ∇_θ ℓ(θ). At an interior differentiable optimum, an MLE candidate satisfies the score equation s(θ)=0.

results.rationale: The score equation s(θ)=0 formalizes the condition for an optimum of the log-likelihood, which is derived from the likelihood function. The evidence directly presents the score equation as a condition based on the likelihood.
